note: First day: at least 1 wet and 1 meconium (black tarry) stool; feeds may be sleepy
Aim for 8-12 feeds per 24h; still passing meconium
Milk coming in; stools turning green/brown (transitional)
Expect yellow seedy stools and heavier wet diapers
Steady state: 6+ wet and 3+ yellow stools per day with 8-12 feeds
